news.title:
Indian tyre firms face cost hikes due to US-Iran war; CLSA warns of profit risks.
Crude oil and rubber costs, rupee depreciation hit margins; CEAT up 1.8%, MRF down 1.1%.
news.summary:
Indian tyre firms face cost hikes due to US-Iran war; CLSA warns of profit risks.
Crude oil and rubber costs, rupee depreciation hit margins; CEAT up 1.8%, MRF down 1.1%.

news.title:
CEAT Ltd announces participation in investor meets on Feb 26, 2026.
Events include IIFL and Kotak-hosted conferences in Mumbai, sharing no UPSI.
news.summary:
CEAT Ltd announces participation in investor meets on Feb 26, 2026.
Events include IIFL and Kotak-hosted conferences in Mumbai, sharing no UPSI.

news.title:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.
news.summary:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.

news.title:
CEAT's CAMSO division expects double-digit margins from Q4 as one-time costs won't recur.
OEM MHCVs are recovering; LCV growth forecasted in high double-digits, driven by e-commerce.
news.summary:
CEAT's CAMSO division expects double-digit margins from Q4 as one-time costs won't recur.
OEM MHCVs are recovering; LCV growth forecasted in high double-digits, driven by e-commerce.

news.title:
CEAT projects strong single-digit growth in the tire industry by FY31 due to tax policies, EV adoption, and premiumization.
Near-term MHCV tire demand may see mid-to-high single-digit growth, while two-wheeler tires may achieve high single-digit growth.
news.summary:
CEAT projects strong single-digit growth in the tire industry by FY31 due to tax policies, EV adoption, and premiumization.
Near-term MHCV tire demand may see mid-to-high single-digit growth, while two-wheeler tires may achieve high single-digit growth.

news.title:
Brokerages bullish on Ceat post strong Q3FY26, citing demand and efficiency.
Analysts warn of near-term margin pressure from currency, commodity headwinds.
news.summary:
Brokerages bullish on Ceat post strong Q3FY26, citing demand and efficiency.
Analysts warn of near-term margin pressure from currency, commodity headwinds.

news.title:
Waaree Renewable secures Rs. 37.96 cr order, while IRFC posts record PAT of Rs. 1802 cr in Q3 FY26.
Ceat Ltd's Q3 FY26 profit reaches Rs. 155.8 cr; Tata Capital's revenue rises to Rs. 5783.3 cr.
news.summary:
Waaree Renewable secures Rs. 37.96 cr order, while IRFC posts record PAT of Rs. 1802 cr in Q3 FY26.
Ceat Ltd's Q3 FY26 profit reaches Rs. 155.8 cr; Tata Capital's revenue rises to Rs. 5783.3 cr.

news.title:
CEAT Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings call is scheduled for Jan 20, 2026.
The call, hosted by Equirus Securities, will review CEAT's Q3 FY26 financial performance.
news.summary:
CEAT Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings call is scheduled for Jan 20, 2026.
The call, hosted by Equirus Securities, will review CEAT's Q3 FY26 financial performance.

news.title:
CEAT expects double-digit growth in Q4 despite margin pressures from rising raw material costs and currency volatility.
Exports grew 25% YoY, with Europe as the largest market. CEAT is expanding capacity at Chennai and Nagpur plants.
news.summary:
CEAT expects double-digit growth in Q4 despite margin pressures from rising raw material costs and currency volatility.
Exports grew 25% YoY, with Europe as the largest market. CEAT is expanding capacity at Chennai and Nagpur plants.

news.title:
LTIMindtree, Tata Capital, Adani Power, CEAT, Oberoi Realty, and Sai Silks report mixed Q3 FY26 results.
Adani Power wins NCLAT approval for ₹4,000 cr Vidarbha plan; CEAT posts 60.3% net profit rise YoY.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree, Tata Capital, Adani Power, CEAT, Oberoi Realty, and Sai Silks report mixed Q3 FY26 results.
Adani Power wins NCLAT approval for ₹4,000 cr Vidarbha plan; CEAT posts 60.3% net profit rise YoY.

news.title:
CEAT plans to raise tyre production capacity by 3.5M units annually.
It will invest ₹13.14B in its Chennai manufacturing facility.
news.summary:
CEAT plans to raise tyre production capacity by 3.5M units annually.
It will invest ₹13.14B in its Chennai manufacturing facility.

news.title:
Ceat Ltd invests ₹361 lakh in its subsidiary's rights issue, acquiring 29,575 shares.
Subsidiary's FY24 turnover grew to ₹3,225.7 lakh; transaction at arm's length.
news.summary:
Ceat Ltd invests ₹361 lakh in its subsidiary's rights issue, acquiring 29,575 shares.
Subsidiary's FY24 turnover grew to ₹3,225.7 lakh; transaction at arm's length.

news.title:
CEAT Ltd raised ₹250 crores via NCDs on Dec 30, 2025, with no deviations.
Funds usage aligns with plans; shared under SEBI norms, no auditor comments.
news.summary:
CEAT Ltd raised ₹250 crores via NCDs on Dec 30, 2025, with no deviations.
Funds usage aligns with plans; shared under SEBI norms, no auditor comments.

news.title:
Ceat Ltd disclosed its quarterly statement under SEBI Regulation 52 regarding utilization of NCD issue proceeds.
Funds raised via private placement of Rs. 250 crore showed no deviation or variation in utilization as per the report.
news.summary:
Ceat Ltd disclosed its quarterly statement under SEBI Regulation 52 regarding utilization of NCD issue proceeds.
Funds raised via private placement of Rs. 250 crore showed no deviation or variation in utilization as per the report.

news.title:
CEAT's Q3 net profit rose 60.3% YoY to ₹155.7 crore, revenue grew 26% to ₹4,157 crore.
EBITDA surged 65.2% YoY to ₹563.3 crore, with margins improving to 13.5% from 10.3%.
news.summary:
CEAT's Q3 net profit rose 60.3% YoY to ₹155.7 crore, revenue grew 26% to ₹4,157 crore.
EBITDA surged 65.2% YoY to ₹563.3 crore, with margins improving to 13.5% from 10.3%.

news.title:
Ceat Ltd reports Q3 revenue of ₹3,957.2 Cr and PAT of ₹191.6 Cr.
Board approves ₹1,314 Cr Chennai plant expansion, adding 35L tyres/year by H1 FY28.
news.summary:
Ceat Ltd reports Q3 revenue of ₹3,957.2 Cr and PAT of ₹191.6 Cr.
Board approves ₹1,314 Cr Chennai plant expansion, adding 35L tyres/year by H1 FY28.

news.title:
CEAT partners with CleanMax for 59 MW hybrid wind-solar projects.
The project aims to generate 13.6 crore units annually, raising clean energy usage to 60%.
news.summary:
CEAT partners with CleanMax for 59 MW hybrid wind-solar projects.
The project aims to generate 13.6 crore units annually, raising clean energy usage to 60%.

news.title:
CEAT Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Somraj Roy, SVP-HR, effective January 14, 2026.
The resignation is to pursue opportunities within the Group; required disclosures are provided.
news.summary:
CEAT Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Somraj Roy, SVP-HR, effective January 14, 2026.
The resignation is to pursue opportunities within the Group; required disclosures are provided.

news.title:
Ceat Ltd approved investment in two SPVs for 59 MW wind-solar projects.
Investing ₹19.6 Cr and ₹12.8 Cr for 26% equity; aims for 60% clean energy.
news.summary:
Ceat Ltd approved investment in two SPVs for 59 MW wind-solar projects.
Investing ₹19.6 Cr and ₹12.8 Cr for 26% equity; aims for 60% clean energy.

news.title:
Ceat Ltd established a UK subsidiary, CEAT INTERNATIONAL UK LIMITED, with 15,000 shares at GBP 1 each.
The subsidiary, a related party transaction, currently has no turnover as it's newly incorporated.
news.summary:
Ceat Ltd established a UK subsidiary, CEAT INTERNATIONAL UK LIMITED, with 15,000 shares at GBP 1 each.
The subsidiary, a related party transaction, currently has no turnover as it's newly incorporated.
